title: Mantessan panthac

A creature from the forest world of [[Mantessa]], the '''Mantessan''' '''panthac''' was one of its most dangerous predators. The fierce pack animal was so deadly that several attempts to breed it offworld caused severe destruction to the native fauna of planets where it was raised.

Nevertheless, panthacs were also smuggled out of Mantessa by slavers and hunters. Infamous [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] slaver [[Phylus Mon]] kept a pack of Mantessan panthacs as a part of his personal security entourage.

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] used the panthac as the base template for the creation of the genetically modified [[Garral/Legends|garral]]. A [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] unit, the [[Orange Panthacs]], were named after the animal.

It also spawned the phrase ''"A panthac doesn't change its stripes"''. It's unclear whether this striped version of a panthac was a different species, sub-species, the product of the Imperials' experiments or simply just a point being made in the phrase's context.
